skater_rank_basis: On-ice and personal statistics are combined into puck-carrying and away-from-the-puck based statistics. Metrics are heavily weighted toward the current season, but use the last 3 seasons to assign certainty. Fits and models are trained solely on data available through the public NHL API. All analysis on this page excludes empty-net goals unless otherwise specified. Metrics are also shrunk based on certainty and stability, so it may take several games for a player to be appropriately ranked. Low-sample split metrics are only ranked after minimum usage thresholds are met (150 EV minutes; 90 PP minutes; 90 PK minutes).
goalie_rank_basis: Shot-stopping and save-based statistics are combined into goalie rankings. Metrics are heavily weighted toward the current season, but use the last 3 seasons to assign certainty. Fits and models are trained solely on data available through the public NHL API. All analysis on this page excludes empty-net goals unless otherwise specified. Metrics are also shrunk based on certainty and stability, so it may take several games for a goalie to be appropriately ranked. Goalies need at least min(10, ceil(10% of an 82-game season)) starts to qualify.
team_rank_basis: On-ice team statistics are combined into attacking, defending, and special teams based statistics. Metrics are heavily weighted toward the current season, but use the last 3 seasons to assign certainty. Fits and models are trained solely on data available through the public NHL API. All analysis on this page excludes empty-net goals unless otherwise specified. Metrics are also shrunk based on certainty and stability, so it may take several games for a team to be appropriately ranked.
underrated_rank_basis: Talent, role, and context statistics are combined into an underplayed score. Metrics are heavily weighted toward the current season, but use the last 3 seasons to assign certainty. Fits and models are trained solely on data available through the public NHL API. All analysis on this page excludes empty-net goals unless otherwise specified. Metrics are also shrunk based on certainty and stability, so it may take several games for a player to be appropriately ranked.

scoring_anomalies.basis: Minimum 10 total points for point-profile tables and minimum 8 total goals for 5v5 goal-share. Points are derived from season goal events. 5v5 means exact 5 skaters vs 5 skaters with goalies on ice. Power-play points include all man-advantage goal points with a goalie in net. 5v5 + PP can be less than total because shorthanded, 4v4, 3v3, and extra-attacker situations are separate. 1-goal games use the final goal margin from season goal events.

recent_basis: Recent mover lists use custom rating changes versus the 2026-03-27 snapshot, which is the day before the weighted-median 10th most recent team game. Skater movers use overall talent score, team movers use total team score, goalie movers use goalie score, and usage lists compare the most recent 10 games to the previous 10.
